title: Paramount’s Deal for Warner Bros. Is Cleared by US DOJ
description: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.

title: Class V Group Founder Analyzes Unique Features of SpaceX's Record $75B IPO
description: Lise Buyer, Founder at Class V Group and one of the architects of Google's IPO, provided insights on SpaceX's recent record-breaking $75 billion IPO. She highlighted the unusual aspects of the offering, including its fixed pricing rather than a price range, and the staggered lockup release structure. She speaks to Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tom Mueller on SpaceX’s Rise and Space Economy
description: Tom Mueller, Founder and CEO of Impulse Space and first employee at SpaceX, discussed SpaceX’s evolution from a risky startup in 2002 to a $2 trillion public company. He described early skepticism, repeated test failures, and key milestones such as reaching orbit, servicing the ISS, landing reusable rockets, and enabling global internet. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
